title: VINEST 12PCS Decorative Love Heart Balloons, Retro Helium Balloon for Decorate, 18 Inches Foil Balloons With 1 Ribbon, for Wedding Valentines Day Engagement and Brithday Party
features: 【Decorative Balloon Set】The set includes 12 18-inch love heart balloons and a balloon ribbon, there are red and cream colors for you to choose, these love heart balloons engagement party decorations have special meanings, perfect for your festival or party decorations.

【High Quality Aluminum Film Balloons】Our heart balloons are made of high-quality aluminum film material, which is very durable, not easy to break, and has a long service life. they are shiny and can create a unique and sweet atmosphere for the party.

【Easy To Use】These heart-shaped balloons are easy to use: they can be inflated with air or helium, and it is recommended to inflate to 85%-90% to prevent over-expansion and bursting. you can use these heart decorations balloons to decorate the room for your children and partners, adding a festive atmosphere.

【Unique Design】The balloon adopts a unique heart-shaped design, which is more visually attractive and more eye-catching than traditional round balloons, adding a decorative effect. love heart balloons symbolize love and romance, and are suitable for special occasions such as weddings, valentine's day and birthdays.
